title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 531.020 - Proceedings in, how governed
text:
531.020.  Proceedings in, how governed. — The relator shall be named as such, in the information against such person usurping, intruding into or unlawfully holding or executing any such office or franchise, and shall proceed thereon in such manner as is usual in cases of information in the nature of a quo warranto.
(RSMo 1939 § 1783) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1619; 1919 § 2067; 1909 § 2632
